text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day before the end of summer camp, and
I've just finished seeing off an exhausted Sakura
Chiyono O.
choice_data_list: (Hm? Are those two who I think they are?)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Fire up the engines I've never used before, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Those are fine words to declare. I've changed my
mind on her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, C.B.! Wait, could it be?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Was it you who cajoled my adorable Chiyo into
confronting me like that?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, wow! Just look at how beautiful the moon
is.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha! You're awful at deflecting suspicion!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: And yet somehow I know you will still forgive me.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
You know, the moon and stars in the sky can only
follow their inexorable paths forward. But
wouldn't it be miraculous if they could alter that
fate?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
If the hands of the clock could tick backwards,
and just for a moment, the past could change
places with the future.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
If the Derby you left behind and the Arima Kinen
you never ran were to manifest before my eyes in
all their glory...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what the sight of such miracles might stir
in me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...You sure are selfish, you know that?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Well, I never pretended to be some chivalrous
legend.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I'm just someone who wants to see what she wants
to see, and who gets lonely when she loses
someone... Is that so selfish?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...You two sure know how to stir up trouble.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But you and Chiyo both understand, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The fact that I've been invited to the Dream
Trophy means that it's not just me who knows it...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They can all see that I've long since passed my
peak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, dawn breaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With summer camp behind them, the Umamusume
are eager to greet the fall season that lies
ahead...
